title: leontodon taraxacum var. laevigatus
intro: Leontodon taraxacum var. laevigatus, also known as smooth dandelion, is a variety of the common dandelion plant (Leontodon taraxacum). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and other conditions. The smooth dandelion plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the smooth dandelion plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
